compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing test for relates_to-only filtering in LINK handler
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
The local ticket system supports 3 link relations: blocks, depends_on, relates_to. The LINK handler must only process relates_to events and skip blocks/depends_on. This test ensures non-relates_to LINK events are ignored.

## Test Approach
Given: A LINK event with data.relation='blocks' and SYNC events for both source and target
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: set_relationship() is NOT called

Given: A LINK event with data.relation='relates_to' and SYNC events for both source and target
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: set_relationship() IS called with link_type='Relates'

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py (Edit: add test for relation filtering)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test verifies blocks/depends_on LINK events are skipped
  Verify: grep -q "relates_to.*filter\|relation.*blocks\|skip.*blocks" tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py
- [ ] Tests fail (RED — handler does not exist yet)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "relates_to_filter" --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR"
